scripts.test: pnpm --filter @listenai/resource-manager test -- --run src/resource-manager.test.ts src/server/app.test.ts src/server/lease-manager.test.ts src/server/lease-integration.test.ts && pnpm --filter @listenai/resource-client test -- --run src/http-resource-manager.test.ts && pnpm --filter @listenai/skill-logic-analyzer test -- --run src/logic-analyzer-skill.test.ts src/generic-skill.test.ts src/capture-loader.test.ts src/waveform-analyzer.test.ts
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @listenai/contracts build && pnpm --filter @listenai/resource-client build && pnpm --filter @listenai/resource-manager build && pnpm --filter @listenai/skill-logic-analyzer build
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @listenai/contracts typecheck && pnpm --filter @listenai/resource-manager typecheck && pnpm --filter @listenai/resource-client typecheck && pnpm --filter @listenai/skill-logic-analyzer typecheck
